headline: Sands China Celebrates Sixth Consecutive Year in Dow Jones Best-in-Class Indices
summary: In recognition of its outstanding performance in Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) practices, Sands China Ltd. has been named in the latest Dow Jones Best-in-Class (DJBIC) Indices, including the Dow Jones Best-in-Class World Index for the fifth consecutive year and the Dow Jones Best-in-Class Asia Pacific Index for the sixth consecutive year, making it the world's only integrated resort operator to be concurrently listed in both indices – a strong validation of its exceptional performa
